title: Neighbors Not Enemies Act
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.
crs_summary: Neighbors Not Enemies Act This bill repeals provisions authorizing the President to apprehend and remove from the United States the citizens of a particular nation, if the United States has declared war against that nation or that nation has threatened an invasion against the United States.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.
